## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] test (tests only)
- [ ] chore (build/tooling/maintenance)

## Validation

- [ ] flutter analyze passes locally
- [ ] flutter test passes locally
- [ ] I tested the affected flow on my target platform

## Security and Secrets Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit API keys, tokens, passwords, or private endpoints
- [ ] I did not commit Firebase service config files with real project data
- [ ] I did not commit signing keys, keystores, or private certificates
- [ ] I used local ignored files for secrets (for example .env.local)

## Docs and Screenshots

- [ ] I updated README or docs if setup/behavior changed
- [ ] I added screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes (if relevant)

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number> (if applicable)
